question: Does Rule 7 on the yellow sign read exactly '7. Report hazards to the Safety Lead immediately and log in the work order system.'?
Does the new text in Rule 7 end with a period and match the font weight (boldness) of the other rules on the sign?
Does Rule 6 on the yellow sign now show the speed limit as '8 mph'?
Is the 'mph' abbreviation in Rule 6 properly spaced and proportioned (not stretched or distorted) compared to the surrounding text?
Does the 'First Aid' line on the EMERGENCY CONTACTS board read exactly 'First Aid: (555) 234-1020'?
Does the first inspection log (left) show the Inspector name as 'J. Lynn'?
Does the second inspection log (right) show the Inspector name as 'K. Woods'?
Do the edited inspector names on the logs match the original printed font style and alignment relative to the 'Inspector:' label?
Are the 'Main Office' and 'Safety Lead' phone numbers on the EMERGENCY CONTACTS board preserved unchanged?
Do the inspection logs still show the original dates '02/10/2026' and 'Status: OK'?
Are the other rules (1-5, 8-10) and the header on the yellow sign unchanged in wording and appearance?
Does the yellow sign retain its original matte/worn metal texture in the edited areas without unnatural smoothing?
